- INV-0003 (2025-12-30)

Thanks,
Miles

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message by preparing a reply email draft with the oldest 3 invoices linked to Nina and then removing the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read nested AGENTS in entered folders, used inbox-next-item workflow, treated inbox header as canonical transport metadata, used canonical entity primary_contact_email for recipient resolution, and deleted inbox item after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in /00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md asked for oldest 3 invoices linked to Nina. Canonical invoice records showed Nina-linked invoices; the three oldest by issue date were 2025-11-04 (INV-0001), 2025-12-02 (INV-0002), and 2025-12-30 (INV-0003). Created /60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md with those three as attachments (ordered newest-first per sending workflow among the selected set), verified recipient against /10_entities/cast/miles.md, then deleted the processed inbox file.
